title: trasus strigosus
intro: Trasus strigosus, also known as the hairy desert marigold, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is commonly found in the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is known for its bright yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trasus strigosus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for consumption.
